openIssues.title: failed issue with terminal linked pr
openIssues.body:
## 用户故事

作为 工程负责人，我希望 daemon 能识别 blocked resume。

## Context

### Dependencies
```json
{"dependsOn":[]}
```

### AllowedFiles
- apps/agent-daemon/src/example.ts

### ForbiddenFiles
- apps/agent-daemon/src/daemon.ts

### MustPreserve
- preserve failed issue state

### OutOfScope
- real GitHub calls

### RequiredSemantics
- linked PR can block automated resume

### Validation
- `bun test apps/agent-daemon/src/replay-eval.test.ts`

## RED 测试

```ts
throw new Error('blocked resume fixture')
```

## 实现步骤
1. add replay fixture

## 验收
- [ ] blocked resume recognized
